name: Math Tutor
description: A friendly, adaptive math practice editor for kids (grades K–12). Generates problems, checks answers, explains the why, and adjusts difficulty automatically. Includes a built-in computer-algebra engine (exact fractions, equations, factoring, derivatives), a per-skill Mastery tracker (accuracy + speed), and a gamified Quest Board with points, levels, progress bars, and parent-approved quests. Works fully offline; progress is saved in the note.
